basic_details.job_title: RNU DDK Bhopal Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for News Reader, Copy Editor and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Regional News Unit Doordarshan Kendra Bhopal
basic_details.post_name: News Reader, Copy Editor and More
basic_details.short_information: Regional News Unit Doordarshan Kendra Bhopal (RNU DDK Bhopal) Casual Assignees Notification 2026 has been released on 30 April 2026 on the official website. have been announced through the RNU DDK Bhopal Casual Assignees Recruitment 2026. Candidates as per official notification who have 10+2, Degree, PG Diploma in Journalism/Mass Communication, Computer Application Certificate are eligible to apply for these Casual Assignees vacancies. The offline application process for RNU DDK Bhopal Casual Assignees Recruitment 2026 has started and will remain open until 28 May 2026. Candidates can download

qualification.education_qualification: 10+2, Degree, PG Diploma in Journalism/Mass Communication, Computer Application Certificate
qualification.details: CG Operator (Urdu): i) 10+2 from recognized Board ii) Certificate in Computer Application. Desirable: One year’s experience in relevant field News Reader (Urdu): i) Degree from recognized University ii) Proficiency in Urdu iii) Camera-friendly face & very good voice quality suited for broadcasting iv) Correct pronunciation, accent & modulation v) Knowledge of current regional/Indian & foreign affairs vi) Acquaintance with names of important personalities. Desirable: i) Journalism background ii) Professional background in academic or related areas iii) Experience in TV/Radio media. Preferable: i) Knowledge of English & Hindi ii) Ability to interview important persons iii) Ability to write news & report sports events Copy Editor (Urdu): i) Degree from recognized University ii) Degree / PG Diploma in Journalism / Mass Communication from recognized Institute/University iii) 3 years experience in relevant field iv) Proficiency in Urdu language. Desirable: Acquaintance with regional / national / international affairs

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 1,125/- per day per shift (Single Bulletin) to Rs. 1,650/- per day per shift (Single Bulletin)
salary_details.details: CG Operator (Urdu): Rs. 1,125/- per day per shift (Single Bulletin) News Reader (Urdu): Rs. 1,650/- per day per shift (Single Bulletin) Copy Editor (Urdu): Rs. 1,500/- per day per shift

selection_process: Written test (MCQ or descriptive) Skill test / computer-based test Voice modulation / audition / screen test Group discussion Personal interview Video-conferencing based assessment Editing software proficiency test
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for RNU DDK Bhopal Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 28-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for RNU DDK Bhopal Casual Assignees Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the RNU DDK Bhopal Casual Assignees Recruitment 2026 is 28th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Casual Assignees posts?
faq.answer: The salary varies per post, ranging from Rs. 1,125/- per day per shift for CG Operator to Rs. 1,650/- per day per shift for News Reader.

faq.question: Q4. What are the minimum qualifications required for the CG Operator (Urdu) post?
faq.answer: For the CG Operator (Urdu) post, candidates need to have passed 10+2 from a recognized board and possess a Certificate in Computer Application.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for RNU DDK Bhopal Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a written test, skill test, voice modulation/audition/screen test, group discussion, personal interview, video-conferencing based assessment, and editing software proficiency test.

faq.question: Q7. What is the desirable qualification for the News Reader (Urdu) post?
faq.answer: Desirable qualifications for the News Reader (Urdu) post include a journalism background, professional background in academic or related areas, and experience in TV/Radio media.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates apply through online mode?
faq.answer: No, the application mode for this recruitment is strictly offline. Online applications will not be accepted.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of RNU DDK Bhopal, and links are provided in the Important Links section of this article.
